recommendations.title: The Wannabes
recommendations.overview: Daniel and Stéphane, two salesmen working in the same store but who cannot stand each other, decide despite everything to team up to participate in television games so they can pay their debts.

recommendations.title: Dad Friend

recommendations.title: Vanquish

recommendations.title: The Exchange Student

recommendations.title: Benji
recommendations.overview: Two school kids strike up a friendship with an orphaned puppy named Benji. When danger befalls them and they end up kidnapped by robbers who are in over their heads, Benji and his scruffy sidekick come to the rescue.

recommendations.title: The Young Victoria

recommendations.title: The Boy
recommendations.overview: An intimate portrait of a 9 year old sociopath as he discovers his taste for killing.
